headlines.description: Manchester United began their Europa League campaign with a 1-1 draw after they were held by FC Twente at a rainy Old Trafford on Wednesday, with a goal from Christian Eriksen being cancelled out by Dutch striker Sam Lammers.
headlines.shortLinkText: Man United let lead slip in home draw with Twente

headlines.description: Athletic Bilbao have condemned the behaviour of some of their fans after flares were thrown during their 1-1 Europa League draw with AS Roma at the Stadio Olimpico on Thursday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Bilbao condemn fans behaviour in Europa League match at Roma

headlines.description: Tottenham  got their Europa League campaign off to the perfect start on Thursday as they overcame Qarabag 3-0, despite being forced to play the majority of the match with 10 men after defender Radu Dragusin was shown an early red card.
headlines.shortLinkText: Spurs overcome red card, delay to win UEL opener

headlines.description: Tottenham Hotspur claimed a 2-1 win at Ferencvaros in their Europa League group match on Thursday thanks to goals in each half from Pape Sarr and Brennan Johnson. Senegalese midfielder Sarr opened the scoring in the 23rd minute, taking advantage of a...
headlines.shortLinkText: Red-hot Johnson scores again in Spurs UEL win

headlines.description: Harry Maguire's dramatic stoppage-time header earned Manchester United a 3-3 draw at Porto in a roller-coaster Europa League group match on Thursday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Maguire rescues UEL draw for 10-man Man United

headlines.description: Artem Dovbyk's first-half penalty earned AS Roma a 1-0 home victory over Dynamo Kyiv in an uneventful Europa League match on Thursday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Dovbyk penalty gives Roma 1-0 win against Kyiv

name: Rigas Futbola Skola at Eintracht Frankfurt

headlines.description: Fenerbahce coach Jose Mourinho was sent off as his side drew 1-1 with his former club Manchester United in the Europa League on Thursday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Mourinho sees red as Man Utd held by Fenerbahce

headlines.description: Tottenham Hotspur secured a narrow 1-0 win over AZ Alkmaar to mark three wins in three games in the Europa League on Thursday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Richarlison keeps Spurs perfect in Europa League

headlines.description: Tottenham Hotspur's perfect Europa League start ended as they lost 3-2 at Galatasaray on Thursday with Victor Osimhen scoring twice for the hosts and Will Lankshear netting his first goal for Spurs but also getting sent off.
headlines.shortLinkText: Osimhen double as Galatasaray sink 10-man Spurs

headlines.description: A brace from Amad Diallo earned Manchester United a 2-0 win over PAOK Salonika in the Europa League on Thursday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Amad double hands United 1st Europa League win

headlines.description: Manchester United came from behind to beat Bodo/Glimt 3-2 in the Europa League on Thursday, Spurs conceded late to draw 2-2 with AS Roma and leaders Lazio were held to a scoreless draw by Ludogorets.
headlines.shortLinkText: WRAPUP 1-Soccer-Man United win, Spurs draw with Roma, Lazio held

name: PAOK Salonika at Rigas Futbola Skola

headlines.description: Manchester United came from behind to beat Bodo/Glimt 3-2 in the Europa League and secure their first victory under new manager Ruben Amorim.
headlines.shortLinkText: Højlund brace helps Amorim to first Man Utd win

headlines.description: Tottenham's Europa League round-of-16 qualification hopes were dented on Thursday as they were made to settle for a point by Roma as Mats Hummels' 91st-minute goal earned a point for Claudio Ranieri's side in an entertaining contest in north London.
headlines.shortLinkText: Late Hummels heroics earn Roma draw at Spurs

headlines.description: Forward Rasmus Hojlund scored twice to allow Manchester United to come back from a goal down and get a 2-1 win at Czech side Viktoria Plzen in the Europa League on Thursday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Højlund goals help Utd to comeback win in UEL

name: Rigas Futbola Skola at Maccabi Tel-Aviv

headlines.description: Tottenham Hotspur's Dejan Kulusevski cancelled out Hamza Igamane's early second-half opener for Rangers in a thrilling 1-1 Europa League draw at Ibrox stadium on Thursday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Spurs draw at Rangers as winless streak continues

headlines.description: Tottenham Hotspur captain Son Heung-min scored in each half to earn his side a 3-2 victory at Hoffenheim in the Europa League on Thursday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Spurs hang on for vital 3-2 win over Hoffenheim

headlines.description: Bruno Fernandes goal saves Man United late in win over Rangers
headlines.shortLinkText: Bruno goal saves United in late win over Rangers

name: Ajax Amsterdam at Rigas Futbola Skola

headlines.description: Ajax Amsterdam made sure of a place in the Europa League playoffs as they beat Galatasaray 2-1 at home on Thursday and went above the Turkish league leaders in the final group standings.
headlines.shortLinkText: Ajax end Galatasaray's long unbeaten streak with Europa League win

headlines.description: AS Roma secured their place in the Europa League playoffs with a 2-0 home win over German side Eintracht Frankfurt on Thursday, while the visitors still secured a top-eight position despite the loss.
headlines.shortLinkText: Roma book Europa League playoff place with win over Frankfurt

headlines.description: Lazio finished top of the Europa League group stage despite a 1-0 defeat at Sporting Braga on Thursday as the Portuguese side failed to secure a playoff spot.
headlines.shortLinkText: Lazio top Europa League group stage despite defeat at Braga

name: Rigas Futbola Skola at Dynamo Kyiv

headlines.description: Manchester United cruised through to the Europa League knockout stages after goals from Diogo Dalot and Kobbie Mainoo earned the Premier League side a 2-0 victory.
headlines.shortLinkText: Mainoo nets; Utd reach Europa League knockouts

headlines.description: Nico Raskin headed the opener and Vaclav Cerny slotted a second as Rangers beat Belgian side Union Saint-Gilloise 2-1 in Glasgow on Thursday to go directly through to the Europa League round of 16.
headlines.shortLinkText: Rangers see off Union 2-1 to secure top-eight slot

headlines.description: Tottenham Hotspur booked their berth in the Europa League's last 16 with a 3-0 victory over Swedish side Elfsborg on Thursday
headlines.shortLinkText: Youngsters lift Spurs to 3-0 Europa League win

headlines.description: Francisco Moura's second-half strike earned hosts Porto a 1-1 draw against 10-man AS Roma in the first leg of their Europa League knockout round playoff on Thursday as Turkish champions Galatasaray lost 4-1 at AZ Alkmaar.
headlines.shortLinkText: Roma held at Porto, Galatasaray thrashed at Alkmaar

notes.text: 2nd Leg - AS Roma advance 4-3 on aggregate
notes.headline: 2nd Leg - AS Roma advance 4-3 on aggregate

notes.text: 2nd Leg - AZ Alkmaar advance 6-3 on aggregate
notes.headline: 2nd Leg - AZ Alkmaar advance 6-3 on aggregate

notes.text: 2nd Leg - Ajax Amsterdam advance 3-2 on aggregate
notes.headline: 2nd Leg - Ajax Amsterdam advance 3-2 on aggregate

notes.text: 2nd Leg - Real Sociedad advance 7-3 on aggregate
notes.headline: 2nd Leg - Real Sociedad advance 7-3 on aggregate

notes.text: 2nd Leg - Viktoria Plzen advance 3-1 on aggregate
notes.headline: 2nd Leg - Viktoria Plzen advance 3-1 on aggregate

headlines.description: Tottenham Hotspur suffered a 1-0 defeat at AZ Alkmaar in the first leg of their Europa League last-16 tie on Thursday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Bergvall own goal condemns Spurs to loss at AZ

headlines.description: Manchester United took the lead through Joshua Zirkzee but were held to a 1-1 draw at Real Sociedad in the first leg of their Europa League last-16 tie on Thursday as Tottenham Hotspur suffered a 1-0 defeat at AZ Alkmaar.
headlines.shortLinkText: Man United frustrated in 1st-leg draw at Sociedad

headlines.description: A stoppage-time goal earned AS Roma a 2-1 home win over Athletic Bilbao in the first leg of their Europa League last-16 tie on Thursday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Roma snatch late victory over Athletic Club

notes.text: 2nd Leg - Athletic Club advance 4-3 on aggregate
notes.headline: 2nd Leg - Athletic Club advance 4-3 on aggregate

headlines.description: Nico Williams scored twice as Athletic Club advanced to the Europa League quarter-finals with a 3-1 second-leg win over 10-man AS Roma on Thursday and Lazio progressed after a 1-1 home draw with Viktoria Plzen.
headlines.shortLinkText: Athletic Club knock out 10-man Roma to reach UEL QF

notes.text: 2nd Leg - Eintracht Frankfurt advance 6-2 on aggregate
notes.headline: 2nd Leg - Eintracht Frankfurt advance 6-2 on aggregate

notes.text: 2nd Leg - Manchester United advance 5-2 on aggregate
notes.headline: 2nd Leg - Manchester United advance 5-2 on aggregate

headlines.description: Bruno Fernandes netted a hat trick as Manchester United eased to a 4-1 win over Real Sociedad to reach the Europa League quarterfinals.
headlines.shortLinkText: Fernandes hat trick fires Man Utd to UEL quarters

notes.text: 2nd Leg - Tied on aggregate - Rangers advance 3-2 on penalties
notes.headline: 2nd Leg - Tied on aggregate - Rangers advance 3-2 on penalties

notes.text: 2nd Leg - Tottenham Hotspur advance 3-2 on aggregate
notes.headline: 2nd Leg - Tottenham Hotspur advance 3-2 on aggregate

headlines.description: Tottenham Hotspur advanced to the Europa League quarterfinals 3-2 on aggregate after beating AZ Alkmaar 3-1 in London on Thursday in the second leg of the round-of-16 matchup.
headlines.shortLinkText: Spurs overturn 1st-leg deficit to reach UEL last 8

headlines.description: Two errors from Manchester United goalkeeper André Onana helped Lyon claim a dramatic 2-2 draw in the first leg of their Europa League quarterfinal on Thursday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Onana blunders cost Man United in draw at Lyon

headlines.description: Tottenham Hotspur had to settle for a 1-1 draw at home to Eintracht Frankfurt in a lively first leg of their Europa League quarter-final on Thursday, with Pedro Porro cancelling out the visitors' early opener by Hugo Ekitike.
headlines.shortLinkText: Wasteful Spurs settle for draw with Frankfurt

notes.text: 2nd Leg - Athletic Club advance 2-0 on aggregate
notes.headline: 2nd Leg - Athletic Club advance 2-0 on aggregate

headlines.description: Athletic Club advanced to the Europa League semifinals with a 2-0 home win over Rangers in their quarterfinal second leg on Thursday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Rangers ousted by Athletic Club in UEL quarters

notes.text: 2nd Leg - Tottenham Hotspur advance 2-1 on aggregate
notes.headline: 2nd Leg - Tottenham Hotspur advance 2-1 on aggregate

headlines.description: A first-half penalty by Dominic Solanke secured Tottenham Hotspur a 1-0 win at Eintracht Frankfurt in the second leg of their Europa League quarter-final on Thursday for a 2-1 aggregate victory.
headlines.shortLinkText: Tottenham hang on to reach Europa League semis

notes.text: 2nd Leg - Tied on aggregate - Bodo/Glimt advance 3-2 on penalties
notes.headline: 2nd Leg - Tied on aggregate - Bodo/Glimt advance 3-2 on penalties

headlines.description: Nikita Haikin made the vital save as Bodo/Glimt pulled off a stunning penalty shootout win away to Lazio on Thursday to become the first Norwegian team to reach the semifinals of the Europa League.
headlines.shortLinkText: Bodo/Glimt complete comeback, stun Lazio in shootout

notes.text: 2nd Leg - Manchester United advance 7-6 on aggregate
notes.headline: 2nd Leg - Manchester United advance 7-6 on aggregate

headlines.description: Harry Maguire scored in the dying seconds of extra time to help Manchester United snatch a place in the Europa League semifinals with a sensational 7-6 aggregate victory over Lyon.
headlines.shortLinkText: Man United survive ET thriller to make UEL semis

headlines.description: Three first-half goals helped Manchester United put themselves on the cusp of the Europa League final on Thursday, with the Premier League side earning a 3-0 semi-final first leg win away at Athletic Bilbao.
headlines.shortLinkText: Fernandes puts rampant Man Utd on verge of final

headlines.description: Tottenham Hotspur put aside their woeful domestic season with a 3-1 home victory against Norway's Bodo/Glimt leaving them within sight of the Europa League final on Thursday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Spurs get upper hand with 1st leg win over Bodo/Glimt

notes.text: 2nd Leg - Tottenham Hotspur advance 5-1 on aggregate
notes.headline: 2nd Leg - Tottenham Hotspur advance 5-1 on aggregate

headlines.description: Tottenham Hotspur avoided any mishaps in the Arctic Circle by easing into the Europa League final with a composed 2-0 win at Norway's Bodo/Glimt for a 5-1 aggregate victory on Thursday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Spurs beat Bodo to seal Europa League final spot

notes.text: 2nd Leg - Manchester United advance 7-1 on aggregate
notes.headline: 2nd Leg - Manchester United advance 7-1 on aggregate

headlines.description: Manchester United booked their berth in the Europa League final after a 4-1 semifinal win Athletic Club on Thursday, with Mason Mount scoring twice to hand the hosts a 7-1 aggregate win.
headlines.shortLinkText: Mount's stellar double seals Man Utd's spot in final

headlines.description: Tottenham Hotspur won a scrappy Europa League final 1-0 against Manchester United in Bilbao on Wednesday to salvage their season and earn a berth in next year's Champions League thanks to Brennan Johnson's bundled first-half goal.
headlines.shortLinkText: Tottenham edge past Man United to clinch historic Europa League
